executionValidation: Every C code_input uses profileId c, fixedLanguage c, recipeType fixed_tests, and a complete multi-file workspace.
Every official solution compiles as C11 and passes its deterministic stdout tests during golden validation.
Every multi-file exercise publishes a complete solutionFiles set covering every starter workspace path.
Source checks target the implementation file that owns the required algorithm rather than grading main.c formatting.
pedagogy: Animate state changes before learners implement pointer-heavy or recursive algorithms.
Keep runtime analysis in the lesson explanation while executable tests verify observable behavior.
Use supplied harnesses so learners focus on one algorithmic responsibility at a time.
